scenario: Product Quality Complaint — injectable vial defect, no adverse event.
input_text:
SOURCE CHANNEL: Fax (Scanned)

To CardioMed,

During stock intake our nurse noticed a vial of CholoClear-X Injectable with a broken tamper seal and a small floating particle visible in the solution. The vial was quarantined and not administered to any patient. Reporting this as a quality issue and requesting guidance on replacement and return shipping.

No patient was exposed.

Nurse Manager, St. Anne's Regional Medical Center
labeling_notes: Visible defect (broken seal, foreign particle), product quarantined, no patient exposure -> PQC, not AE.
